final:
module custom_logic_v (
	input x,
	input y,
	input z,
	input w,
	output reg v);

assign v = x&~y&z&~w | x&y&z&w | x&~y&~z&w | x&y&~z&~w;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (x & ~y & z & ~w) begin
        v <= 0;
      end else if (x & y & z & w) begin
        v <= 0;
      end else if (x & ~y & ~z & w) begin
        v <= 0;
      end else if (x & y & ~z & ~w) begin
        v <= 0;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
